channel.title: Opentelemetry on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Opentelemetry on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Self-Hosted OpenTelemetry Collector: Complete Observability Pipeline Guide 2026
item.description: Modern infrastructure generates three streams of telemetry data: metrics, traces, and logs. For years, teams routed each stream through separate agents and pipelines — Fluentd for logs, Prometheus exporters for metrics, and Jaeger agents for traces. This fragmented approach created operational overhead, inconsistent data, and vendor lock-in at every layer.
